purpose: Define the source-backed contract for deterministic swarm memory residency, spill, brownout, and no-win policy receipts.

scenarios.name: exact_limit_hot_resident
scenarios.requirement: A workload that fits its lane budget is admitted fully hot with no spill, brownout, or refusal.

scenarios.name: over_limit_spill
scenarios.requirement: A proof-artifact workload with explicit spill permission keeps the requested hot floor resident and spills only the cold remainder.

scenarios.name: optional_brownout
scenarios.requirement: Optional diagnostics under saturated pressure brown out optional bytes while preserving all core runtime invariants.

scenarios.name: empty_budget_no_win
scenarios.requirement: A nonzero request against a zero lane budget produces an explicit no-win receipt rather than pretending the workload is resident.

scenarios.name: stale_metrics_no_win
scenarios.requirement: Metrics older than the request bound produce a fail-closed no-win receipt.

scenarios.name: contradictory_policy_no_win
scenarios.requirement: Requests whose minimum hot byte floor exceeds requested bytes produce a fail-closed no-win receipt.

semantic_rules.account_for_every_byte: hot_resident_bytes + warm_resident_bytes + spilled_bytes + browned_out_bytes + refused_bytes must equal requested_bytes.
semantic_rules.resident_bytes_fit_lane: hot_resident_bytes + warm_resident_bytes must never exceed before.lane_budget_bytes.
semantic_rules.no_ambient_memory_probe: The planner derives decisions only from the explicit SwarmCapacitySnapshot and SwarmMemoryResidencyRequest.
semantic_rules.stable_task_identity: affected_task_ids are trimmed, sorted, deduplicated, and preserved in the plan.
semantic_rules.fail_closed_receipts: Empty budgets, stale metrics, contradictory policy, and no safe residency tier all return refuse_no_win with a fallback_reason.
semantic_rules.core_runtime_protection: Memory brownout never discards core scheduling, cancellation drain, loser drain, region quiescence, or obligation cleanup.

proof_lane.command: RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 rch exec -- env CARGO_INCREMENTAL=0 CARGO_PROFILE_TEST_DEBUG=0 RUSTFLAGS='-C debuginfo=0' CARGO_TARGET_DIR=${TMPDIR:-/tmp}/rch_target_scheduler_swarm_memory_residency cargo test -p asupersync --test scheduler_swarm_evidence_artifact swarm_memory_residency --features test-internals -- --nocapture
proof_lane.scope: Focused contract tests for the scheduler swarm memory residency planner and its artifact.

forbidden_semantics: delete files as part of memory pressure handling
create git branches or worktrees for this policy
drop structured concurrency, cancellation, loser-drain, region-quiescence, or obligation-cleanup invariants during brownout
treat stale or contradictory inputs as successful admission
